display.purpose: Hero and final-CTA headlines only. One per page maximum.

headline.purpose: Section headlines, pricing tier names, case-study titles.

title.purpose: Card titles, FAQ questions, table column headers.

body.purpose: Paragraph text. Capped at 65–75ch per line.

label.purpose: ALL-CAPS Space Grotesk eyebrows above section headlines and on chips.

metric.purpose: Standalone statistics (dollar amounts, percentages). Always paired with a Body-Small caption.

shadows.name: state-hover
shadows.purpose: Cards and pricing tiers on hover. Charcoal-tinted, never pure black.

shadows.name: state-focus
shadows.purpose: Focus ring on inputs and keyboard-focused interactive elements.

shadows.name: lift-nav
shadows.purpose: A single hairline under the sticky nav once scrolled past the hero.

shadows.name: lift-dialog
shadows.purpose: Modal dialogs and popovers only. Never on a card.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default state-transition easing. Used for hover, focus, and reveal.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button hover, link color change, chip toggle.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The default conversion CTA. Charcoal at rest; green on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1a1a1a; color: #fbf9f3; padding: 14px 26px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; letter-spacing: -0.005em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2d7d5f; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(45,125,95,0.20); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outline-style alternate action. Always visually defers to Primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #fbf9f3; color: #1a1a1a; padding: 14px 26px; border: 1px solid #e6e3da; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f5f2ea; }

components.name: Ghost on Dark
components.description: Used in the dark hero / final CTA section over charcoal.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #fbf9f3; padding: 14px 26px; border: 1px solid rgba(251,249,243,0.25); border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(251,249,243,0.08); border-color: rgba(251,249,243,0.5); }

components.name: Healthcare Green Chip
components.description: Trust signals: HIPAA badge, Live indicator, success state.
components.css: .ds-chip-green { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #e9f1ec; color: #225f48; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-chip-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 999px; background: #2d7d5f; }

components.name: Standard Card
components.description: Default content surface. Pure-white over Paper sections; flat at rest.
components.html:
FEATURE

Answers Calls Instantly

Sera picks up on the first ring, identifies the caller, and asks the right intake questions before your front desk hears anything.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; color: #1a1a1a; padding: 32px; border: 1px solid #e6e3da; border-radius: 8px; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(26,26,26,0.04), 0 8px 24px rgba(26,26,26,0.06); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #2d7d5f; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: -0.005em; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.55; color: #5a5a5a; margin: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Default form input. Healthcare-green focus ring is the only place green appears as a glow.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: block; } .ds-input-label { display: block; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #ffffff; color: #1a1a1a; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1px solid #e6e3da; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7a7a7a; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #2d7d5f; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(45,125,95,0.20); }

components.name: Nav Link (active)
components.description: Active top-nav link with healthcare-green underline.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #5a5a5a; text-decoration: none; padding: 4px 0; position: relative; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-nav-link.active { color: #2d7d5f; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-link.active::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: -4px; height: 2px; background: #2d7d5f; border-radius: 1px; }

components.name: Pricing Tier (default)
components.description: Standard pricing card. Cormorant tier name, Space Grotesk price, Instrument body.
components.html:
Practice
$249/ month

For independent practices answering up to 400 calls a month.

WHAT'S INCLUDED
  • ✓Unlimited after-hours coverage
  • ✓Appointment booking into your scheduler
  • ✓Call summaries and transcripts
components.css: .ds-tier { background: #fbf9f3; color: #1a1a1a; padding: 40px 32px; border: 1px solid #e6e3da; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-tier-name { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 2rem; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.015em; color: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-tier-price { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-tier-amount { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 2.5rem; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-tier-cadence { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; color: #5a5a5a; } .ds-tier-desc { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.55; color: #5a5a5a; margin: 0 0 24px; } .ds-tier-eyebrow { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #5a5a5a; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-tier-features { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0 0 32px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; } .ds-tier-features li { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.55; color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-check { color: #2d7d5f; font-weight: 600; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-tier-cta { margin-top: auto; }

components.name: Testimonial Card
components.description: Two-column metric + quote. Terracotta-underlined owner name is the system's only Terracotta moment.
components.css: .ds-testimonial { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr; gap: 48px; align-items: start; padding: 40px; background: #f5f2ea; border: 1px solid #e6e3da; border-radius: 8px; margin: 0; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .ds-testimonial { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; } } .ds-metric-value { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 3rem; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-metric-caption { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #5a5a5a; max-width: 240px; } .ds-quote-rule { width: 32px; height: 1px; background: #e6e3da; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-testimonial-quote { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 0; padding: 0; max-width: 65ch; } .ds-testimonial-quote + .ds-quote-rule { margin-top: 16px; } .ds-testimonial-sig { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.55; color: #5a5a5a; margin-top: 16px; } .ds-sig-name { color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: #c85a2a; text-decoration-thickness: 1.5px; text-underline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Section Eyebrow
components.description: Small but signature: ALL-CAPS Space Grotesk in healthcare green opens every section.
components.html:
HOW IT WORKS

A system that works while your staff works

When your team is busy or your clinic is closed, Sera answers calls, asks the right questions, and delivers structured summaries to your staff.
components.css: .ds-section { padding: 64px 0; max-width: 720px; } .ds-eyebrow { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #2d7d5f; margin: 0 0 16px; } .ds-section-headline { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: clamp(1.875rem, 3.6vw, 2.75rem); line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.015em; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 0 0 16px; } .ds-section-sub { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a5a5a; max-width: 65ch; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Sera's surface reads like a console for someone who runs a business. A serious, calm, document-grade interface — closer to Stripe's restraint or a medical journal's gravity than to consumer SaaS. Trust is earned through precision: tight type, generous whitespace, restrained color, surgical use of green. The system is Restrained on the color-strategy axis: tinted neutrals carry the surface, with the healthcare green appearing on roughly 10% of any given screen. Surfaces are flat at rest; shadows appear only as a response to state. We explicitly reject generic SaaS landing patterns, AI-tool marketing aesthetics, and the category-reflex pull toward 'healthcare = teal-on-white-medical'.
keyCharacteristics: Charcoal-dominant surface with cream/ivory neutrals, never pure white
One accent (healthcare green) used on ≤10% of any view
Editorial serif display + operational sans + technical mono
Flat by default; depth from layering and rule lines, not shadows
Type scale ratio ≥ 1.4 between major steps
Zero ornament — every glyph, line, and shape earns its place

rules.name: The 10% Green Rule
rules.body: Healthcare Green appears on no more than 10% of any rendered viewport. Its rarity is the load-bearing trust signal.

rules.name: The Terracotta Whisper Rule
rules.body: Terracotta exists only for moments of human warmth — a testimonial signature, a pull-quote underline. Never used for buttons, badges, navigation, status, or charts.

rules.name: The No-Pure Rule
rules.body: Neither #000 nor #fff is allowed. The palette is tinted at every step.

rules.name: The Category-Reflex Ban
rules.body: No teal, no medical-aqua, no clinic-cyan, no white coats. Healthcare-by-cliché is forbidden.

rules.name: The One Display Rule
rules.body: Display type appears once per page maximum.

rules.name: The Numeric Authority Rule
rules.body: Numbers always render in Space Grotesk, never Cormorant or Instrument.

rules.name: The Cap-Lock Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Eyebrow labels are ALL CAPS in Space Grotesk with 0.12em tracking.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No surface carries a shadow at rest. If a card needs a shadow to look like a card, fix the border or surface tint instead.

rules.name: The Charcoal-Tinted Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow uses rgba(26,26,26, x) — never rgba(0,0,0, x).

rules.name: The Single-Hairline Rule
rules.body: Borders and dividers use one color (#e6e3da) at one weight (1px).

dos: Do keep Healthcare Green to ≤10% of any rendered viewport.
Do tint every neutral toward warm gray. Pure values are forbidden.
Do lead every section with an outcome, not a feature.
Do ship one and only one primary CTA per surface.
Do use Space Grotesk for every numeric value.
Do lock body paragraph measures at 65–75ch.
Do show specificity for trust — 'Recovered $42K at Summit PT in Boulder' beats 'Trusted by 150+ clinics'.
Do design for the operator scrolling at 7am between patients on a phone.
donts: Don't use bento-box grids or identical icon-heading-paragraph card stacks.
Don't use purple gradients, glowing orbs, neon-on-black, or 'powered by GPT' badges.
Don't use generic clinic stock photos (smiling-receptionist, doctors fist-bumping).
Don't use the category-reflex healthcare palette: teal-on-white, medical aqua, clinical cyan.
Don't use vague CTAs ('Learn More', 'Click Here', 'Get Started', 'Sign Up', 'Choose Plan').
Don't present hidden or 'Contact Sales' pricing.
Don't use em dashes in body copy. Terracotta-underlined em dash in testimonial signatures is the only exception.
Don't use side-stripe borders as accents on cards or callouts.
Don't use gradient text or glassmorphism decoratively.
Don't use modals as a first thought.
Don't animate layout properties or use bounce/elastic easing.
